title: FactSet appoints Alexandra van Nes Head of Investor Relations

title: FactSet Schedules Fourth Quarter 2023 Earnings Call
text: NORWALK, Conn., Aug. 24, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FactSet  (NYSE: FDS | NASDAQ: FDS) a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, announced today that it will release its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter fiscal 2023, ending August 31, 2023, on Thursday, September 21, 2023. FactSet will also host a conference call to discuss these results at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Thursday, September 21, 2023.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Retain FactSet Research (FDS)
text: Factset (FDS) banks on its global presence while being exposed to foreign currency exchange risks.

title: FactSet Declares Dividend
text: NORWALK, Conn., Aug. 03, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FactSet (NYSE: FDS | NASDAQ: FDS), a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, today announced that its Board of Directors approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.98 per share.
